[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001000000 1
1 000000000 a
2 110001010 4
3 100000100 2
4 000100010 2
5 100000000 1
6 000100000 1
7 011000000 2
